narrative:
Liberty Twp 28 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,212 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
